_comment: SpotMeter mod - configuration. Place at <WoT>/mods/configs/spotmeter.json (or one of the legacy paths). NumLock-on, NumpadPeriod (or Delete) reloads this file in-battle.
_comment_view_mode: If true (default), use the player's own view range as the assumed enemy VR. If false, use enemyViewRangeFallback. Picker (when active) overrides both.
_comment_crew: Approximate crew Camouflage skill multiplicative bonus for the player's tank.
_comment_color: Circle colors as RGB int. 16737095=tomato (moving), 3329330=lime (still), 16753920=orange (afterShot), 2263842=forestGreen (camo net active).
_comment_perf: How often to recompute (s) and the speed (m/s) above which counts as moving.
_comment_fire: After firing: camo *= invisibilityFactorAtShot for fireRevealDuration s.
_comment_camo_net: Camo net on the player's own tank activates after camoNetActivateSec of NOT MOVING and adds the descriptor's invisibilityBonus. Auto-detected from optionalDevices.
_comment_picker_layout: Picker hotkeys (numpad, NumLock either way). Picker reads the enemy's full vehicle descriptor from server, including hull/turret/gun/optics/stereoscope. Crew skills, consumables and vents are NOT transmitted - manual toggles for those.
_comment_picker_bonuses: Two-stage model that mirrors VehicleDescrCrew.py exactly. Stage 1 - commander main role: factor = 0.57 + 0.43 * efficiency, where efficiency = (100 + extra_levels) / 100. So a 100% commander gives factor 1.0; with BIA (+5) commander goes to 105% -> factor 1.0215 (+2.15% to VR). Stage 2 - perks: Recon and SitAware add to cvrB proportionally to effective level. Their multipliers express the value at 100% skill (1.02 = +2%, 1.03 = +3%). Final: VR_factor *= commander_factor * (1 + cvrB). Examples: BIA alone -> +2.15%; Recon alone -> +2%; full 5-toggle stack -> +15.1%; matches game's _processSkills loop exactly.
_comment_picker_commander: Commander main role -> circularVisionRadius factor mapping from VehicleDescrCrew.py:_processSkills line 301. Don't tune unless WG changes the formula.
_comment_overlay: Overlay posts a chat-line with the current spot to the in-battle message feed (above minimap). NumpadEnter shows full status snapshot (all toggles + computed values). Numpad * (pickerDiagDumpKey) dumps the picked enemy's full descriptor to python.log for diagnostics.
_comment_debug: logCalcDetails=true logs camo/radius/state each tick to python.log.
